Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.command: grep -C 2 "aurora observation date" ./haystack.txt | grep -E "(draft|preliminary|superseded|aurora observation date)"
args.description: Find all aurora observation date entries and check for draft/preliminary markers

tool_returns.detail:
The Northhollow aurora observation date is 1992-04-17, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Otherwick aurora observation date is 1995-09-22, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Penrith aurora observation date is 2001-02-08, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Quenwick aurora observation date is 2014-11-30, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Riverstone aurora observation date is 2020-06-14, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
